Title: User adds custom vehicle details
Preconditions: The application is installed on the user's Android device.
Test Data: Custom vehicle details (make, model, year, fuel type, consumption)
Test Steps:
1. Indicate the custom vehicle make.
2. Indicate the custom vehicle model.
3. Indicate the custom vehicle year.
4. Indicate the custom vehicle fuel type.
5. Indicate the custom vehicle consumption.
Expected Result: The custom vehicle details are saved and used by the application to provide relevant information.

Title: Configuration Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Follow the initial setup process
3. Enter the required vehicle details and preferences
Expected Result: The application is configured with the user's vehicle details and preferences.

Title: Add Custom Vehicle
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the vehicle settings
3. Select the option to add a custom vehicle
4. Enter the required custom vehicle details
Expected Result: The custom vehicle is added to the application.

Title: Access Gas Stations List
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the gas stations list
Expected Result: The list of gas stations is displayed.

Title: Open External Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Select a gas station from the list
2. Tap the navigation button
Expected Result: The external navigation application is opened with the route to the selected gas station.

Title: Access Statistics
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the statistics section
Expected Result: The user's statistics are displayed.

Title: Modify Statistics
Preconditions: User has made a purchase to register
Test Steps:
1. Open the statistics section
2. Tap the modify button
3. Enter the modified statistics data
Expected Result: The user's statistics are updated with the new data.

Title: Clear Statistics
Test Steps:
1. Open the statistics section
2. Tap the clear button
Expected Result: The user's statistics are cleared.

Title: Access Settings
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the settings section
Expected Result: The application settings are displayed.

Title: Modify/Delete Vehicle
Test Steps:
1. Open the settings section
2. Tap the vehicle option
3. Select the vehicle to modify or delete
4. Modify or delete the vehicle details
Expected Result: The vehicle details are updated or deleted as specified.

Title: Modify Preferred Radius
Test Steps:
1. Open the settings section
2. Tap the preferences option
3. Modify the preferred radius
Expected Result: The preferred radius is updated with the new value.

Title: View Statistics
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Statistics" button on the main menu.
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the statistics page.
3. Verify that the user can see their fuel consumption statistics.
Expected Result: The user can view their fuel consumption statistics.

Title: Modify Vehicle List
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Vehicles" button on the main menu.
2. Tap on the "Modify List" button.
3. Enter the new vehicle data.
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
5. Verify that the new data is saved and displayed on the vehicles page.
Expected Result: The user can modify the list of vehicles.

Title: Check Affordability
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Affordability" button on the main menu.
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the affordability page.
3. Verify that the user can see the list of fuel stations and their prices.
4. Verify that the user can filter the list based on their preferences.
5. Verify that the user can see the most affordable fuel station.
Expected Result: The user can check the affordability of fuel stations.

Title: Find Nearest Station
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Find Nearest Station" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the user is redirected to a map view with the nearest affordable fuel station marked.
Expected Result: The user can find the nearest affordable fuel station.

Title: Get Directions
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the marker of the nearest affordable fuel station on the map view.
2. Verify that a dialog is displayed with the directions to the fuel station.
Expected Result: The user can get directions to the nearest affordable fuel station.

Title: Check Station Details
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the marker of a fuel station on the map view.
2. Verify that the details of the fuel station are displayed.
Expected Result: The user can check the details of a fuel station.

Title: Report Station
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the marker of a fuel station on the map view.
2. Tap on the "Report" button.
3. Enter the reason for the report.
4. Tap on the "Send" button.
5. Verify that a confirmation dialog is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can report a fuel station.

Title: Check Report Status
Preconditions: User has reported a fuel station.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Reports" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the user can see the list of their reports.
3. Verify that the status of the reported fuel station is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can check the status of their reports.

Title: Check Station Updates
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Updates" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the user can see the list of updates on fuel station prices.
Expected Result: The user can check the updates on fuel station prices.

Title: Check Station Reviews
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Reviews" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the user can see the list of reviews on fuel stations.
Expected Result: The user can check the reviews on fuel stations.

Title: Write a Review
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Write a Review" button on the reviews page.
2. Enter the review text.
3. Tap on the "Send" button.
4. Verify that a confirmation dialog is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can write a review on a fuel station.

Title: Check User Reviews
Preconditions: User has written a review on a fuel station.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "My Reviews" button on the reviews page.
2. Verify that the user can see the list of their reviews on fuel stations.
Expected Result: The user can check their reviews on fuel stations.

Title: Check Frequently Asked Questions
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "FAQ" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the user can see the list of frequently asked questions.
Expected Result: The user can check the frequently asked questions.

Title: Contact Support
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Contact Support" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that a dialog is displayed with the contact details.
Expected Result: The user can contact the support team.

Title: Check Terms and Conditions
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Terms and Conditions" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the terms and conditions are displayed.
Expected Result: The user can check the terms and conditions.

Title: Check Privacy Policy
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Privacy Policy" button on the affordability page.
2. Verify that the privacy policy is displayed.
Expected Result: The user can check the privacy policy.

Title: Check if the application is compatible with Android 8.1 and later versions
Preconditions: The application is installed on an Android device with Android 8.1 or later.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate through the application.
Expected Result: The application should function without any errors or crashes.

Title: Check the application's performance
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is navigating through it.
Test Steps:
1. Perform various actions within the application.
2. Monitor the application's response time.
Expected Result: The application should respond within 4.20 seconds for each action.

Title: Check the application's usability
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is navigating through it.
Test Steps:
1. Perform various actions within the application.
2. Monitor the user's experience and count the number of situations where the user encounters discomfort due to errors or an unintuitive interface.
Expected Result: The user should encounter no more than 4 situations of discomfort during the test.

Title: Check the robustness of the application
Preconditions: The application is launched and the user is navigating through it.
Test Steps:
1. Perform various actions within the application.
2. Monitor the application's behavior and count the number of failures.
Expected Result: The application should fail no more than once out of 10 times during the test.

Title: Check the portability of the application
Test Steps:
1. Check if the application requires an active internet connection.
2. Check if the application requires GPS access.
3. Check if the application shares the user's location with Google services.
4. Check if the application is compatible with Android 8.1 and later versions.
5. Check if the application requires approximately 50 MB of storage space.
Expected Result: The application should meet all the specified requirements.

Title: Navigate to a gas station
Test Steps:
1. Select a gas station.
2. Confirm the navigation to the selected gas station.
Expected Result: GaSmart opens the navigation application.

Title: View user statistics
Test Steps: 1. Tap the icon for the statistics page.
Expected Result: The application shows the statistics page.

Title: Update user statistics
Test Steps: 1. Request to update the statistics.
Expected Result: The application shows the statistics update screen.

Title: Clear user statistics
Test Steps: 1. Request to clear the statistics.
Expected Result: The application clears the statistics.

Title: View application and vehicle settings
Test Steps: 1. Tap the icon for the settings page.
Expected Result: The application shows the settings page.

Title: Modify the list of vehicles
Test Steps: 1. Request to modify the list of vehicles.
Expected Result: The application shows the vehicles list modification screen.
